var_def: Unique district identifier formed by concatenating state and district names; source column statedist in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: State-district ID

var_def: Name of the Indian state or union territory the district belongs to (28 categories); source column state in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: State

var_def: Name of the district under 1991-census boundaries; source column district in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: District

var_def: Observation year of the radiance-calibrated DMSP-OLS nighttime-lights panel: 1996, 1999, 2000, 2004, 2005, or 2010.
label: Year

var_def: Radiance-calibrated DMSP-OLS total nighttime luminosity, rural areas; source column r{year}_1996_rcr_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Rural NTL

var_def: Radiance-calibrated DMSP-OLS total nighttime luminosity, urban areas; source column u{year}_1996_rcr_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Urban NTL

var_def: Radiance-calibrated DMSP-OLS total nighttime luminosity, all areas; source column t{year}_1996_rcr_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Total NTL

var_def: Radiance-calibrated nighttime luminosity per capita in 1996; source column light96_rcr_cap in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py); carried verbatim for paper replication.
label: NTL per capita (1996)

var_def: Natural log of nighttime luminosity per capita in 1996, the initial-condition regressor of the paper's convergence model; source column log_light96_rcr_cap in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py); carried verbatim for paper replication.
label: Log NTL per capita (1996)

var_def: Annualized growth rate of nighttime luminosity per capita between 1996 and 2010, the dependent variable of the paper's convergence model; source column light_growth96_10rcr_cap in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py); carried verbatim for paper replication.
label: NTL per capita growth (1996-2010)

var_def: District population in 1996; source column pop_96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Population (1996)

var_def: District population in the 2001 census; source column pop01 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Population (2001)

var_def: Agricultural suitability index (district mean); source column suit_mean_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Agricultural suitability

var_def: Mean rainfall over the district; source column rain_mean_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Rainfall

var_def: Malaria index (district mean); source column mala_mean_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Malaria index

var_def: Mean temperature over the district; source column temp_mean_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Temperature

var_def: Terrain ruggedness of the district, in 100 m units; source column rug_mean_snd in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Ruggedness

var_def: Distance from the district to the coast; source column distance in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Distance to coast

var_def: Latitude of the district; source column latitude in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Latitude

var_def: Rural population share, 1996; source column rur_percent96_rcr in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Rural population share

var_def: Natural log of population density (persons per sq. km); source column log_tot_density_rcr in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Log population density

var_def: Scheduled Castes population share, 1996; source column sc_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: SC population share

var_def: Scheduled Tribes population share, 1996; source column st_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: ST population share

var_def: Working population share, 1996; source column workp_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Working population share

var_def: Literate population share, 1996; source column lit_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Literacy share

var_def: Population share with higher education, 1996; source column higheredu_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Higher education share

var_def: Share of households with an electricity connection, 1996; source column elechh_percent96 in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Electricity share

var_def: Natural log of households with access to paved (pucca) roads; source column log_puccaroads in india520.dta (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Log paved roads
